_comment: 광주 반도체 55초 쇼츠 — 숫자 중심, 평택 대비 '앞으로 이렇게 바뀐다'. ★공식 예측 아님·투자권유 아님(마지막 컷 고지). 속도 1.2. 세로 1080x1920.
style_token: semi-realistic editorial documentary illustration, warm muted urban palette, thick clean outlines, korean city and industrial scenes, soft cinematic lighting, detailed, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo
negative: photo, photorealistic, 3d render, text, letters, words, numbers, watermark, logo, western caucasian, scary, dark, ugly, deformed, blurry

beats.head: 평택은 2배, 광주는?
beats.text: 평택은 반도체로 도시가 2배 커졌습니다. 광주 군공항은 어떨까요?
beats.prompt: a wide split scene: a giant semiconductor plant on one side, a fast-growing korean city skyline on the other, dramatic contrast, question mood

beats.head: 20조 → 41.8조
beats.prompt: a booming korean industrial new town with apartment towers and cranes rising rapidly beside a huge fab, vitality, aerial

beats.head: 광주는 54.8조
beats.prompt: a panoramic view of the current korean metropolitan city of Gwangju, established but calm, before transformation, daytime

beats.head: 250만평·800조·팹4기
beats.text: 군공항 250만 평에 800조 투자, 반도체 팹 네 기 구상.
beats.prompt: an enormous semiconductor mega-cluster masterplan on a vast former airfield, multiple huge fab buildings at grand scale, wide

beats.head: → 100조 (약 2배)
beats.text: 성공 시나리오면 광주 경제는 100조 안팎. 지금의 약 2배입니다.
beats.prompt: a korean city skyline visibly doubling in size, expanding upward and outward into an advanced-manufacturing metropolis, dusk glow

beats.head: 세수 2.2조 → 3조
beats.prompt: a well-funded korean city building new schools hospitals and infrastructure, prosperity funding public life, warm symbolic

beats.head: 10만 유입
beats.text: 광산구, 송정, 수완, 나주까지, 10만 명이 새로 유입됩니다.
beats.prompt: families and engineers moving into new korean apartment districts near a KTX station, moving trucks, lively residential growth, aerial

beats.head: 단, 조건이 있다
beats.text: 단 공장만으론 안 됩니다. 협력사, 교통, 대학, 용수까지 붙어야 하는 긍정 시나리오입니다.
beats.prompt: a well-designed korean city where a semiconductor cluster connects with homes transit universities and infrastructure, balanced hopeful growth
